title: REPLACE on a CHECK constraint does not work as advertised
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT CHECK(value > 0));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, -1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = -1;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (2, NULL) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE value = NULL;
key_bug_features: REPLACE operation fails on CHECK constraint
